# Graphyn Code (@graphyn/code)

## What This Repo Is
`@graphyn/code` is Graphyn's developer CLI for coordinating AI work across specialized agents.
It is the execution cockpit for command-driven, multi-agent software delivery.

## Core Message
One command should move work forward across architecture, backend, frontend, and review.
Graphyn Code is built to make that real in day-to-day engineering workflows.

## Who This Is For
- developers who want agent-assisted execution, not just chat answers
- teams standardizing AI-assisted delivery in codebases
- operators running mission-control style orchestration
- contributors improving CLI, streaming, and orchestration layers

## Product Surface In This Repo
- `graphyn` CLI entrypoints
- mission control and interactive flows
- orchestration and coordination modules
- agent service/runtime integration layers

## Quickstart
```bash
npm install
npm run build
npm run dev
npm run test:package
```

## Backbone Principles Applied Here
- Wiring-first: real orchestration paths, no fake success overlays.
- Evidence-before-assertion: build/test receipts before completion claims.
- Goal-first: prioritize command reliability and agent throughput.

## For Agents
1. Preserve CLI contract and subcommand stability.
2. Keep orchestrator and streaming error handling explicit.
3. Avoid regressions in automation-critical paths.
4. Validate with `npm run build` before claiming readiness.

## Public Links
- Product: https://graphyn.xyz/code
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@graphyn/code

## Technical References
- Commander: https://github.com/tj/commander.js#readme
- Inquirer: https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js#readme
- Chalk: https://github.com/chalk/chalk#readme
- Ora: https://github.com/sindresorhus/ora#readme
- Node.js APIs: https://nodejs.org/docs/latest-v22.x/api/
